title: 开源大模型的中国新平衡：GLM-5.2登顶与DeepSeek 510亿的产业共振
title_en: China's New Equilibrium in Open-Source LLMs: GLM-5.2 Tops Charts as DeepSeek Closes $51B Round
summary: GLM-5.2登顶IndexShare、DeepSeek完成510亿美元A轮融资、字节豆包专业版三档定价、招商银行日均330亿Token——四个看似独立的事件，正在中国AI产业激起同一场共振：开源能力、商业化定价、行业落地、资本估值，正在以前所未有的速度互相校准。
summary_en: GLM-5.2 tops the IndexShare leaderboard, DeepSeek closes a $51B Series A, ByteDance Doubao Pro launches three-tier pricing, and China Merchants Bank hits 33B daily tokens — four seemingly separate events resonate to reshape China's open-source LLM equilibrium across capability, pricing, deployment, and valuation.
